patch.value: Backfill or retire legacy linked-file entries so pm validate --check-files --scan-mode tracked-all has no missing linked paths or orphaned tracked source/test files.

Missing linked paths from old src/*.ts locations are migrated or removed; orphaned tracked files are linked to relevant items or intentionally documented; pm validate --check-files --scan-mode tracked-all passes without file-link warnings.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search linked file validation missing orphaned paths --limit 10 found only closed prior hygiene items; latest audit still reports 15 legacy missing linked paths and 6 orphaned tracked files.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Audit update 2026-05-16: release gate and secret scan pass. pm validate --check-resolution is clean; linked-file hygiene remains separate open scope and was not expanded in this init/package setup fix.
